title: [YTP] Link Saves the Future
description: In this epic action-packed sci-fi fantasy thriller adventure film, a mysterious old man known only as Squadala Man visits our young hero and his uncle, Mr. K Harkinian, with terrifying news.  In the future, Link was to become evil and seize the world.  Link, Squadala, The King, and their new ally Morshu the shopkeeper set off on a journey of conflict, revelations, and self-sacrifice that could determine the fate of mankind.
